channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Baby Abducted from Hospital During Vaccination Appointment
item.description: A 42-day-old baby was allegedly abducted from Nguvu Kazi Hospital in Chanika, Dar es Salaam, during a routine vaccination visit on July 6, 2026. The infant's mother, Sharifa Kassim, recounted how a wo...

item.title: Sowetan's Daily Read Covers Telenovela, World Cup Final, and E-Hailing Success Stories
item.description: The article features a roundup of diverse stories from South Africa and beyond. It highlights the new telenovela 'Nyala O' starring Motlatsi Mafatshe and Mapaseka Koetle, which explores themes of betr...

item.title: Canadian politician pushes for transparency in Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement
item.description: In a recent development, Canadian politician Pierre Poilievre has publicly questioned Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland about the transparency of the Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement. The b...

item.title: Youth Advocates Urge Marcos Jr. to Prioritize Health Policies Ahead of SONA 2026
item.description: The Youth for Health Coalition, alongside lawmakers, is urging President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. to prioritize policies that address youth health challenges ahead of the 2026 State of the Nation Address ...

item.title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe Faces Scrutiny Over Memo Contradicting Trump's Claims on China Election Interference
item.description: In a heated exchange, MS NOW's David Rohde accused CIA Director John Ratcliffe of failing to explain his memo that contradicts President Donald Trump's claims about China's interference in the 2020 U....

item.title: Pauline Hanson's controversial overseas trip and political alliances spark debate
item.description: The article examines the growing controversy surrounding Pauline Hanson's recent overseas trip and her associations with figures like Tommy Robinson and Gina Rinehart. While Hanson's supporters often ...

item.title: Bagamoyo District Commits 800 Million Shillings to Expand Inclusive Education Facilities
item.description: The Bagamoyo District Council in Tanzania has allocated 800 million shillings to construct specialized educational facilities at Nianjema Primary School, aiming to enhance inclusive education for chil...

item.title: Kogi State Launches Multi-Agency Rescue Operation After School Attack
item.description: A group of gunmen attacked Government Secondary School in Olowa, Kogi State, during an ongoing NECO examination on July 15. The attackers abducted five individuals, including the school principal, a N...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Prioritizes Security of Chinese Nationals and Boosts Pakistan-China Economic Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif emphasized the critical importance of ensuring the safety of Chinese citizens in Pakistan during his address at the Pakistan-China Pharmaceutical and Healthcare B2B Inves...

item.title: Dangote Refinery's Dollar Pricing Shift Impacts Nigerian Fuel Market and Naira Policy
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Petrochemicals (DPRP) has reverted to selling domestic fuel in US dollars for the third time since March 2025, raising concerns about Nigeria’s naira-for-crude policy. T...

item.title: UP CM Yogi Adityanath assures security for Kanwar Yatra pilgrims, calls for discipline
item.description: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath has assured enhanced security for Kanwar Yatra pilgrims, emphasizing the need for discipline and adherence to religious values. During his visit to Shamli ...

item.title: Kansai Plascon Launches Limited-Edition Paint to Support Gor Mahia's CAF Champions League Campaign
item.description: Kansai Plascon Kenya has launched a special paint product called Wallcover K'Ogalo Edition, which is linked to Gor Mahia's bid for the 2026/27 CAF Champions League. A portion of sales from this limite...

item.title: ALP commits to gas tax in policy platform to boost resource returns
item.description: The Albanese government has committed to enshrining gas tax plans within the Australian Labor Party's (ALP) policy platform, marking a significant shift towards wealth redistribution. This decision, a...

item.title: Stock market declines as tech sector struggles with earnings and AI delays
item.description: The U.S. stock market experienced a decline on Thursday, with the S&P 500 losing 0.51% and the Nasdaq Composite dropping 1.47% amid a sell-off in technology stocks. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fe...

item.title: Power Companies Request Fuel Cost Adjustment Amid Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: Power companies in Pakistan have requested a Rs1.20 per unit increase in fuel cost charges for consumers in August, citing the use of expensive imported fuels as the primary reason. Despite 75% of ele...

item.title: Community solidarity grows as Thunder Bay supports wildfire evacuees through donations and aid efforts
item.description: Residents of Thunder Bay are mobilizing to assist evacuees displaced by wildfires in northwestern Ontario. Over a dozen communities, including Armstrong, Whitesand First Nation, Namaygoosisagagun Firs...

item.title: Sekunjalo's R5.2 Billion Investment in Media Transformation and Journalism Sustainability
item.description: Sekunjalo Group has maintained a significant investment in South Africa's media industry for over a decade, with total exposure exceeding R5.2 billion. This investment includes the 2013 acquisition of...

item.title: Actor Sam Neill Dies from Pneumonia at 73
item.description: Actor Sam Neill, renowned for his roles in 'Jurassic Park' and 'The Piano,' passed away at the age of 73 due to pneumonia. His agent confirmed the cause of death and announced that a private family me...

item.title: DSWD Expands UPLIFT Program to Support Near-Poor Earners
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) announced the expansion of its UPLIFT program to include tax-paying near-poor earners, not just the poorest Filipinos. Secretary Rex Gatchalian ...

item.title: Salihu Lukman's Political Exit and Coalition Struggles
item.description: Former ADC National Vice Chairman, Salihu Lukman, has suspended his membership of the party and opposition coalition, citing persistent hostility from Kaduna State leaders. This decision highlights a ...
